home.heroDescription: Experience world-class healthcare by connecting with expert doctors and nurses. We're committed to your well-being every step of the way.

services.title: Our Medical Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare solutions tailored to meet your needs with excellence and compassion.

cardiology.title: Cardiology
cardiology.desc: Connect with top cardiologists for comprehensive heart care using state-of-the-art technology.

emergency.title: Emergency Care
emergency.desc: 24/7 access to emergency medical professionals with rapid response and advanced support.

primary.title: Primary Care
primary.desc: Book trusted general practitioners for health checkups and preventive care for all ages.

pediatrics.title: Pediatrics
pediatrics.desc: Find specialized pediatric doctors in a child-friendly, caring environment.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose
whyChoose.subtitle: We bridge the gap between patients and healthcare professionals — making quality medical care accessible, fast, and personal.

network.title: Expert Medical Network
network.desc: Access to board-certified doctors and nurses with years of specialized experience.

matching.title: Instant Matching
matching.desc: Our platform connects you to the right medical professional within minutes.

patientCentered.title: Patient-Centered
patientCentered.desc: Personalized care tailored to your needs, all managed through one easy platform.

availability.title: 24/7 Availability
availability.desc: Round-the-clock access to healthcare professionals whenever you need them most.

reviews.title: What Our Patients Say
reviews.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — hear from some of our satisfied patients.
reviews.review1: MedWasla connected me with an amazing cardiologist within hours. The process was seamless and the doctor was exceptional.
reviews.review2: Finding a specialist used to take weeks. Through MedWasla I had an appointment the same day. Truly outstanding service.
reviews.review3: I've used MedWasla for my whole family. The nurses they connected us with were professional, caring, and highly skilled.

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Health?
cta.patientSubtitle: Book an appointment with our expert doctors today and experience healthcare excellence.
cta.specialistSubtitle: Manage your schedule, appointments, and profile from your professional dashboard.

about.title: About MedWasla
about.subtitle: Your trusted healthcare platform for booking appointments, managing care, and connecting with medical professionals effortlessly.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To simplify healthcare access by connecting patients with trusted doctors, nurses, and healthcare specialists through a secure and user-friendly digital platform. We are committed to making healthcare more accessible, efficient, and reliable for everyone.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading digital healthcare platform that empowers patients to find the right healthcare professionals easily while enabling medical specialists to deliver quality care anytime and anywhere.

trusted.title: Trusted Professionals
trusted.description: We connect patients with verified doctors, nurses, and healthcare specialists to ensure safe and reliable care.

access.title: Easy Access
access.description: We make healthcare services easier to reach by allowing patients to book appointments and manage care online.

patientFirst.title: Patient First
patientFirst.description: We focus on patient needs by providing a simple, convenient, and supportive healthcare experience.

digital.title: Digital Healthcare
digital.description: We use technology to simplify communication between patients and medical professionals anytime and anywhere.

booking.title: Anytime Booking
booking.description: Our platform allows patients to book appointments online 24/7, making healthcare access simple, convenient, and always available.

departments.title: Specialized Departments
departments.description: 10+ specialized departments covering all major medical disciplines.

experts.title: Expert Doctors
experts.description: 100+ board-certified physicians with decades of combined expertise.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help. Reach out and we'll respond within 24-48 hours.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.description: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

faq.q1: Can I manage my appointments online?
faq.a1: Yes. You can schedule, view, and manage your appointments directly through the MedWasla platform.
faq.a2: Yes, we accept most major insurance plans. Please contact our billing department or check with your insurance provider.
faq.q3: How do I schedule an appointment?
faq.a3: You can schedule an appointment through our online booking system, by phone, or by visiting our facility.
faq.a4: Yes, we offer telemedicine consultations for certain medical conditions.

services.heroPatientSubtitle: Everything you need to access quality healthcare — from booking doctors to home nursing care.
services.heroProviderSubtitle: Manage your practice, schedule, and patient requests from one professional dashboard.

access.title: 24/7 Access
access.desc: Book and manage care anytime, anywhere.

trusted.desc: Licensed professionals you can rely on.
